_meta.description: Runtime state of all active AI5R modules. THIS FILE IS NOT EDITED MANUALLY. It is generated and maintained by the Runtime Loader (Sprint 011). This version defines the schema and contains example state for documentation purposes.
_meta.important: Do not trust this file as live runtime state until Runtime Loader (Sprint 011) is operational. Until then, check n8n directly for workflow execution state.

_schema.description: Every entry in active_modules follows this shape

module_runtime_entry.name: string
module_runtime_entry.pid: string | null — process or workflow execution ID
module_runtime_entry.current_mission: string | null — DEV-MISSION-NNN if processing a mission
module_runtime_entry.error: string | null — last error message if status is ERROR

system_health.note: Populated by Runtime Loader in Sprint 011

sprint_011_deliverable.description: Runtime Loader will replace this file with live state
capabilities: Poll n8n every 30s for active workflow execution status
Write status, pid, last_heartbeat to active_modules entries
Detect ERROR state and alert Founder
Track active missions and their current engine step
